sanskrit:
आत्मसम्भाविताः स्थब्धा धनमानमदान्विताः ।
यजन्ते नामयज्ञैस्ते दम्भेनाविधिपूर्वकम् ॥
transliteration: ätma-sambhävitäù stabdhä dhana-mäna-madänvitäù | yajante näma-yajïais te dambhenävidhi-pürvakam ||
literal_meaning: Self-proclaimed, arrogant, intoxicated by wealth and false honor, they perform nominal sacrifices out of ostentation, disregarding scriptural rules.
contextual_meaning: Krishna describes the performative spirituality of demonic narcissists: rituals become props for ego inflation rather than ego transcendence.
psychological_state: Grandiose narcissism masking a hollow core; compulsive impression-management to avoid unconscious worthlessness.
trigger_scenario: An influencer live-streams a charity gala, donating a fraction of showcased wealth, then berates volunteers for 'bad energy' while hashtagged #blessed.
anchor_text: Let your rituals serve humility, not ego.
